test_cases.name: Tech Product Launch — Standard Success
test_cases.description: Tests full end-to-end flow with a tech brand

input.topic: Launching our new AI-powered productivity app that helps remote teams collaborate better

test_cases.name: Missing Topic — Error Handling
test_cases.description: Tests that missing 'topic' field is caught and logged to Error Logs sheet

test_cases.name: Lifestyle Brand — Skincare
test_cases.description: Tests warm tone, brand voice, and correct Instagram hashtag count (10)

input.topic: Handmade organic skincare products using Himalayan herbs, perfect for winter skin care routine

how_to_run.step_1: Start n8n: npx n8n OR docker-compose up
how_to_run.step_4: Copy a test case input below and run the curl command

quick_curl.TC-001: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/social-media-trigger -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"topic": "Launching our new AI-powered productivity app that helps remote teams collaborate better", "brand": "TeamSync AI", "tone": "professional", "platforms": ["facebook", "instagram"]}'
quick_curl.TC-003: curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/social-media-trigger -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"topic": "Handmade organic skincare products using Himalayan herbs, perfect for winter skin care routine", "brand": "Himalaya Glow", "tone": "warm and personal", "platforms": ["facebook", "instagram"]}'
